entry.value: [["currentConversationId","pins","agentExecutionMode","isPanelCollapsed","displayedAnnouncements","conversations","onboarding","a|0|1|2|3|4|5|6","322d26f8-8c26-447b-bab6-9193f87dea9c","o|","auto","b|T","a|","1ee2e0fb-effe-4361-8587-e6e60ee64ecd","beac2010-20a3-4759-85b6-01d10ea2ea0a","a|D|E|8","id","createdAtIso","lastInteractedAtIso","feedbackStates","selectedModelId","requestIds","isPinned","isShareable","extraData","personaType","toolUseStates","chatHistory","draftExchange","a|G|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|Q|R|S","2025-11-21T07:26:04.692Z","claude-sonnet-4-5","b|F","isAgentConversation","hasDirtyEdits","a|X|Y","o|Z|B|W","n|0","request_message","rich_text_json_repr","mentioned_items","status","a|c|d|e|f","","type","content","a|i|j","doc","a|i","paragraph","o|m|n","a|o","o|k|l|p","draft","o|g|h|q|C|r","o|T|D|U|U|9|V|C|W|W|a|b|9|C|s","name","rootTaskUuid","a|G|u|H|I|J|K|L|M|N|O|P|v|Q|R|S","Multi-Channel Intelligence Desk Architecture\n","2025-11-21T07:26:04.757Z","2026-03-14T01:57:47.280Z","claude-sonnet-4-6","hasTitleGenerated","a|X|Y|11","o|12|B|B|B","1ca4ff4a-5f02-4a59-9b1a-b562cfd7e172","a|c|d|f","o|15|h|q|r","o|w|E|x|y|z|9|10|C|W|B|13|b|14|9|C|16","a|G|u|H|I|K|L|M|N|O|v|J|Q|R|S","Phase 4 Integration and Refinement\n","2026-03-14T01:58:00.434Z","2026-03-17T16:16:09.747Z","baselineTimestamp","a|X|Y|11|1C","o|1D|B|B|B|b","715a395b-0dab-4f1e-8495-a1561a857faa","enhance and capabilities and durability, performance ceiling of this project, this includes increasing model capability, thinking strength, complex task solving capabilities and self learning, adaptation features to user, including powerful contextual memory, comprehensive, professional thinking period. Some of these capabilities are already present but needs enhancements, fixing or further implementation. Analyze and study about our current status and start implementing with the highest standard of code strictness. Make sure you have a very detailed, precise and professional plan for enhancement and implementation","text","a|i|1H","o|1I|1H|1G","a|1J","o|k|n|1K","a|1L","o|k|l|1M","o|15|1G|1N|r","o|18|8|19|1A|1B|10|C|W|W|1E|1F|9|9|C|1O","o|F|t|17|1P","shown","workspaceQuestions","a|1R|1S","o|1T|W|C","o|7|8|9|A|B|C|1Q|1U"],"1V"]
